message:
test(e2e): eliminate reload-dependent theme tests with atomic evaluate strategy

Replace safeReload-based theme switching in clickThemeToggle with atomic
page.evaluate that sets localStorage and CSS class simultaneously, avoiding
Turbopack streaming stalls that leave partial hydration. Add
waitForStoredThemeApplied helper with fallback for when ThemeProvider
doesn't hydrate in time. Remove unnecessary reload cycles from dark-mode
and toggle specs, add hydration-stall resilience to system-preference
detection tests, and tighten loose toBeTruthy assertions to exact expected
values. Harden safeReload with longer timeouts, post-reload hydration wait,
and "Execution context was destroyed" in the retryable error list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
